differential_diagnoses: Small-fiber neuropathy secondary to connective tissue disease
next_steps: Complete laboratory workup for systemic inflammatory/rheumatologic conditions including ESR, CRP, ANA, RF, anti-CCP, and ANCA
Initiate physical therapy and rheumatology consultation for the management of active polyarthritis
Optimize vitamin B6 supplementation and monitor for neurologic recovery
Perform a nerve and muscle biopsy if clinical status fails to improve with current management to rule out vasculitic neuropathy
Perform a whole-body screening for malignancy (CT chest/abdomen/pelvis) given the rapid decline and weight loss
Discontinue potentially neurotoxic medications such as tramadol if symptoms persist
